implementation_phases: P2: configs/photon_test_minimal.yaml + Pydantic load 検証
P6: CLAUDE.md + Issue #145 本文 + docs 整合 (510/512)

key_design_decisions.detector_b: trained 参照値との近接性 (mx.allclose(logits) or abs(norm_after - norm_trained) < 1e-5)
key_design_decisions.detector_c: PHOTON_ALLOW_RANDOM_INIT bypass corrupt ckpt 経路 (env 未設定 → RuntimeError, env=1 → WARNING + 続行)
key_design_decisions.private_api_dependency: _build_photon_deps を直接呼出 (受容、signature 変更時は追従)
key_design_decisions.fixture_isolation: tests/integration/conftest.py で autouse fixture 統合、env isolation + MagicMock guard + MLX skip
key_design_decisions.fake_tokenizer: vocab_size=256 + 必要 method 群、_load_hf_tokenizer を monkeypatch で置換
key_design_decisions.ci_strategy: weekly_eval.yml に step 追加 (continue-on-error なし、env dump 禁止、stale log 防止 LOG_BASENAME=logs/integration_test_${GITHUB_RUN_ID})
